summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LeadFlow AI with configured Supabase PostgreSQL database. Backend APIs are fully functional, authentication flow works, but frontend has session persistence issues and legacy Base44 SDK conflicts.

integration_issues.issue: User sessions not persisting between page loads - redirects back to login
integration_issues.impact: Users cannot stay logged in, must re-authenticate on every page refresh

integration_issues.issue: Frontend still making calls to Base44 SDK endpoints (/api/apps/null/entities/User/me)
integration_issues.impact: 404 errors in console, potential interference with authentication flow

passed_tests: Backend environment status shows all services configured
Get current user API works with valid token (GET /api/auth/me)
Signal status update API works correctly (PATCH /api/signals/{id}/status)
Frontend login page renders correctly with proper branding
Frontend registration form works and submits to backend
Frontend login form works and submits to backend
Frontend redirects to dashboard after successful authentication
CORS configuration fixed - frontend can communicate with backend
All form inputs are functional with proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed - all API endpoints working correctly)
success_percentage.frontend: 75% (12/16 features working - authentication flow works but session persistence fails)

action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix frontend session persistence - tokens/cookies not being maintained between page loads. 2. Remove or fix legacy Base44 SDK calls that are causing 404 errors. 3. Ensure authentication state is properly managed in AuthProvider component.
